title: lysimachia sedoides
intro: Lysimachia sedoides, also known as Chinese money plant or sedum lysimachia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Primulaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its roots, leaves, and flowers. The health benefits of Lysimachia sedoides include reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Lysimachia sedoides can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
